name: Polysorbate 80
description: Polysorbate 80 is a hydrophilic nonionic surfactant derived from polyethoxylated sorbitan and oleic acid. It is used as a surfactant in soaps and cosmetics and it also acts as a lubricant in eye drops. In food or pharmaceutical products, it can act as an emulsifier. Polysorbate 80 is an excipient that is used to stabilize aqueous formulations of medications for parenteral administration or vaccinations.
